title: API keys
emptyDescription: Generate an API key to authenticate requests and send emails through the API.
emptyDescriptionApi: Create a key to authenticate API requests.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key
revokeDialog.descriptionSuffix: ? Requests using this key will stop working immediately.

secretDialog.title: API key created
secretDialog.description: Copy your API key now. You will not be able to see it again.

docs.title: API documentation
docs.description: Authenticate requests with a workspace API key. Keys are scoped to this organization and can be revoked at any time.
docs.authenticationLead: Pass your secret key in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. Never expose keys in client-side code or public repositories.
docs.sendEmailLead: Example request using an API key with sending access.
docs.nodeLead: Use the official SDK in server-side applications.
